front: What is the dose-response relationship for peptide drugs?
back: Dose-response for peptides: 1) Linear PK peptides (small, unmodified): dose-proportional. 2) Non-linear PK (binding proteins, receptor-mediated clearance): saturable. 3) U-shaped curves possible (hormesis). Therapeutic window: defined by efficacy (EC50) vs toxicity (TD50). Dose titration common (insulin, GLP-1 agonists).
